emails.subject: 98-9794 (Saxet)
emails.body: 98-9794 (Saxet) The above meter is currently doing 13.0 on a 26.0 nom. Please take a look and see if nom adjustments might be a solution. Looking deal #109670, the terms indicates that HPLC buys 2.5% of Saxet volumes. Should I assume that I should take the total flow amount (per day for this deal ticket) and adjust the expected volumes to reflect a nom that is 2% of the daily flow versus the "1" that is currently nomed? H E L P!!! Thanks -Jackie- 3-9497
